name: CROSS_TOP_ASSIGNEES_BY_TARGETPAIR
description: Top assignees for a target pair.
cypher:
MATCH (tp:TargetPair {name:$tp_name})<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]->(a:Assignee)
RETURN a.name AS assignee, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count
ORDER BY patent_count DESC, assignee
LIMIT 10;

examples: PD-1/VEGFA 上申请最多的企业是谁？
